---
title: "nietzsche: annotations"
bibliography: nietzsche.bib
#nocite: '@pethes_war_2006'
# tables:
#   - tbl_qa: {file: "qa.qmd", num: 1}
#   - tbl-summary: {file: "results.qmd", num: 2}
title-meta: ""
date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'

---

{{< include _vars.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true

#qa1<-"Wiener_Einführung.pdf"
#load("margindb.RData")
m1<-margindb$doc%in%qa[[2]]
sum(m1)
kdf<-margindb[m1,]
kdf<-kdf[order(kdf$doc,kdf$spage),]
kdf<-data.frame(kdf[,c("doc","notes","comment","spage")],row.names = NULL)
kdf$notes<-gsub("[\r\n]","(..)",kdf$notes)
kdf$comment<-gsub("[\r\n]","(..)",kdf$comment)
kdf<-kdf[!(is.na(kdf$notes)&(is.na(kdf$comment)|kdf$comment=="")),]
#kdf<-data.frame(id=which(m1),annotations=margindb$notes$a[m1])
#print(kdf)
#knitr::kable(kdf)

```


## notes on 
paper: 
@nietzsche_kga_2024   
@nietzsche_friedrich_1902


```{r}
#| label: tbl_qa1
#| tbl-cap: "nietzsche: annotations"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true

# qa<-c("Wie KI unsere Sprache","yakura-llm")
# qa<-"lit-ki"
# tdf<-read.csv("qa.csv")

# m1<-tdf$paper==qa[1]

# kdf<-data.frame(id=which(m1),annotations=tdf$a[m1])

#knitr::kable(kdf)
library(kableExtra)

knitr::kable(kdf,row.names = F,booktabs = F) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width = "3cm") %>% 
  column_spec(2, width = "7cm") %>% 
  column_spec(3, width = "3cm") %>% 
  column_spec(4, width = "2cm")

# kable(kdf, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
#   column_spec(1, width = "5cm")
```
